description.value:
Prerequisite: Educated, Knowledge (ninja lore) 9 ranks, one Meta-Chakra Specialization class ability.

Benefit: You gain a +1 bonus to Learn checks when developing or creating Chakra Control, Fuinjutsu, Genjutsu or Ninjutsu techniques. When you teach others techniques of those types, you grant an additional +2 bonus to Learn checks, though you still cannot grant more than a +5 bonus total.
description.summary: You gain a +1 bonus to Learn checks when developing or creating Chakra Control, Fuinjutsu, Genjutsu or Ninjutsu…
